short_summary: Iran deal shifts US focus away
rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement and diplomatic pivot toward the Middle East sustains fresh uncertainty about US attention and aid continuity for Ukraine, while the war itself continues without new qualitative escalation.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy focused on Iran deal raises concern in Kyiv that Washington's attention and political will for Ukraine aid may be further diverted; a qualitatively relevant signal for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Vance says Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US VP publicly criticizing a key ally signals a more assertive US diplomatic posture; Ukrainians watch US-ally dynamics closely for signals about their own support.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia continues
top_events.summary: No new qualitative escalation reported this cycle; ongoing strikes and frontline activity remain the daily reality for Ukrainian residents.
